title: Cockroach Extermination in Franklin Square, Long Island | $350 – $550

intro: Franklin Square residents facing cockroach infestations need fast, reliable solutions to protect their homes and families. Our professional cockroach extermination services target German cockroaches, American cockroaches, and other common species found throughout Long Island. With proven methods and experienced technicians, we eliminate roach problems at the source for lasting results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and the greater Long Island area for years, earning trust through effective treatments and exceptional customer service. Our licensed exterminators understand the unique pest challenges faced by Franklin Square homeowners and businesses, delivering tailored solutions at competitive rates of $350 – $550.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of single-family homes, garden apartments near Hempstead Turnpike, and local businesses around New Hyde Park Road creates diverse environments where cockroaches thrive. From the residential streets near Rath Park to the commercial corridors, our team knows the specific entry points and conditions that attract roaches in this Nassau County community.

faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Our cockroach extermination services in Franklin Square range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Franklin Square residents. Cockroach infestations require immediate attention, and our team prioritizes emergency calls to prevent the problem from spreading throughout your home or business.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Franklin Square properties most commonly deal with German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, and American cockroaches that enter through basements and crawl spaces. We also treat Oriental cockroaches and brown-banded roaches found in Long Island homes.

faqs.question: Is your cockroach treatment safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions and can discuss pet-friendly and child-safe treatment options during your consultation.
